productDefinitions.name: Energy efficiency class
productDefinitions.description: Defines the energy efficiency rating of a product, e.g. A+++

productDefinitions.name: Color
productDefinitions.description: Defines the primary color or pattern, such as blue or striped

productDefinitions.name: Light temperature
productDefinitions.description: Defines the color characteristics of light sources, such as warm white or daylight

productDefinitions.name: Bulb cap type
productDefinitions.description: Specifies the type of cap or base a light bulb or fixture has, e.g. E12, GU10

productDefinitions.name: Bulb shape
productDefinitions.description: Describes the shape of lighting products, e.g. tube, spiral

productDefinitions.description: Safety Note

productDefinitions.name: Specifications
productDefinitions.description: Product Specifications

productDefinitions.name: Key Features
productDefinitions.description: Key Features

productDefinitions.name: Mounting type
productDefinitions.description: Specifies how a product is installed or attached, such as clip-on or suction cup

productDefinitions.name: Light color
productDefinitions.description: Defines the color or hue of light, such as white or multicolor

productDefinitions.name: FAQs
productDefinitions.description: Query questions

productDefinitions.name: Socket type
productDefinitions.description: Identifies the type of socket in power outlets, such as USB or Ethernet

productDefinitions.name: Material
productDefinitions.description: Defines a product's primary material, such as cotton or wool

productDefinitions.name: Candle shape
productDefinitions.description: Describes the form of a candle, such as cylindrical or square

productDefinitions.name: Power source
productDefinitions.description: Specifies the power source a product uses to operate, such as solar or batteries

productDefinitions.name: Item condition
productDefinitions.description: Indicates the quality of an item, typically vehicles or vehicle parts; e.g. certified pre-owned, refurbished

productDefinitions.name: Fit type
productDefinitions.description: Describes the fit type for vehicle parts and accessories, like custom or universal

productDefinitions.name: Lighting features
productDefinitions.description: Describes special characteristics of lighting, like adjustable brightness or LED lighting

productDefinitions.name: Suitable space
productDefinitions.description: Defines the ideal location for product use, e.g. indoors, above ground

productDefinitions.name: Manufacturer type
productDefinitions.description: Specifies the source of vehicle parts or accessories, such as genuine or third-party

productDefinitions.name: Hardware material
productDefinitions.description: Specifies the composition of hardware items, such as metal or stainless steel

productDefinitions.name: Spike design
productDefinitions.description: Identifies the style of spikes, such as tent or landscape fabric

productDefinitions.name: Display technology
productDefinitions.description: Defines the type of screen technology used in a product, e.g. LED, e-ink

productDefinitions.name: Timer type
productDefinitions.description: Specifies the frequency setting for timers, e.g. daily, weekly

productDefinitions.name: Bulb type
productDefinitions.description: Specifies the type of bulb used in lighting products, e.g. LED, halogen

productDefinitions.name: Bulb size
productDefinitions.description: Specifies the size of light bulbs, e.g. A19, C7

productDefinitions.name: Flower color
productDefinitions.description: Specifies the color of the flower, such as pink or multicolor

productDefinitions.name: Theme
productDefinitions.description: Describes the product's primary theme or motif, such as sport, space, or holidays

productDefinitions.name: Plant characteristics
productDefinitions.description: Defines specific traits of plants, e.g. flowering, edible

productDefinitions.name: Shape
productDefinitions.description: Describes the geometric form or shape of a product, such as round or heart

productDefinitions.name: Decoration material
productDefinitions.description: Identifies the material used for decoration, such as sequins or feathers

productDefinitions.name: Battery type
productDefinitions.description: Distinguishes between types of batteries, such as disposable or rechargeable

productDefinitions.name: Style
productDefinitions.description: Describes the style of a product, typically for window treatments; e.g. vertical blind, pleated shades

productDefinitions.name: Finish
productDefinitions.description: Describes the surface quality of a product, like satin or matte

productDefinitions.name: Ingress protection (IP) rating
productDefinitions.description: Provides the official IP water/dust resistance rating the case complies with (e.g., IP68).

productDefinitions.name: Motion sensor type
productDefinitions.description: Identifies the technology used in motion sensors, such as infrared or laser

productDefinitions.name: Light source
productDefinitions.description: Identifies the kind of light bulb used in a product, such as LED or fluorescent

productDefinitions.name: Switch control type
productDefinitions.description: Describes how a light switch is controlled, such as button or sensor

productDefinitions.name: Lampshade shape
productDefinitions.description: Describes the geometrical shape or form of the lamp shade.

productDefinitions.name: Connection type
productDefinitions.description: Specifies the type of connection used by electronics, such as wired or Bluetooth

productDefinitions.name: Light spectrum
productDefinitions.description: Defines the range of light wavelengths a product can produce, e.g. blue light, infrared light

productDefinitions.name: Candle type
productDefinitions.description: Specifies the design of candles, such as taper or tea light

productDefinitions.name: Bulb finish
productDefinitions.description: Describes the external coating or finish of the bulb glass, which affects light diffusion and style.

productDefinitions.name: Glazing material
productDefinitions.description: Identifies the material covering the photo area (e.g., glass, acrylic, or none).

productDefinitions.name: Battery size
productDefinitions.description: Indicates the battery compatibility for the product, such as AAA or 9V
